title: Poke card
description: This Projekt adds an poke Card with that you can capture and release Mobs anywhere. But not endbosses.
body:
🃏 Mob Card Capture

Poke Card Capture adds a craftable capture card that allows players to capture, store, and release mobs in a simple and intuitive way.

Using the capture card on a mob will seal it inside the card. End bosses and boss-type mobs, such as the Ender Dragon or the Wither, cannot be captured to keep game balance intact.

Captured mobs can be released at any time by shift right-clicking, spawning the mob back into the world with the same stats and state it had when captured.

✨ Features

Craftable mob capture card

Capture and store almost any mob

Shift + Right Click to release mobs

End bosses are excluded

Persistent mob data storage

🎮 Use Cases

Mob collection

Easy mob transportation

Stat comparison and analysis

RPG-style gameplay enhancement
